channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - techraptor.net
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: Dungeon Crawler Carl RPG Has Already Raised $3 Million on Backerkit
item.content:encoded:
Renegade Game Studios; crowdfunding campaign for a Dungeon Crawler Carl RPG is a runaway success. The campaign to bring the acclaimed litRPG series to gaming tables has raised over $3 million within minutes of going live.

The Dungeon Crawler Carl RPG Backerkit Campaign

According to the campaign page, the Dungeon Crawler Carl RPG campaign is for two separate projects. One is an official TTRPG adaptation of the Dungeon Crawler Carl series. The second is for Dungeon Crawler Carl: Unstoppable, a version of Renegade's deckbuilding game based on the property. Both projects were part of a deal by the studio that was announced last year.

in the RPG, your character is a participant in World Dungeon, the televised dungeon crawl reality show. According to the campaign, the game's system allows you to customize character, mixing and matching elements from different backgrounds, classes, skills, and more to make your own unique character. If you survive to the third floor, that customization expands more with Race and Class options.

The class and race options in the Dungeon Crawler Carl RPG are in line with the series' comedic tone. Races include skyfowl, caprid, and primal. Whereas classes include Talk Show Host and Professional Gambler.

The Backerkit campaign also contains a bunch of accessories for dedicated fans. This includes boxes of miniatures, dice and dice trays, a starter set, and a season pass which gives you access to digital content for the game which includes more player options, threats, and new magic items.

The different pledge tiers for the Dungeon Crawler Carl RPG are as follows:

  • Tunnel Tuner for $40: PDFs of the core rulebook and starter set
  • Bronze for $55: Digital and physical copy of the starter set
  • Silver for $60: Digital and physical copy of the core rulebook
  • Gold for $150: Physical and digital copies of the starter set and core rules, a Carl's Big Boi Boxers dice set, a Princess Donut Tiara dice set, a GM screen, and a Season Pass
  • Gold Plus for $210: Everything from the Gold Tier, a copy of Dungeon Crawler Carl: Unstoppable, and its Crawler Chaos expansion
  • Platinum for $269: Everything from the Gold Plus tier, a character journal, a Smush dice set, an "I Will Kill Your Mother" dice tray, and three novelty dice bags
  • Legendary for $399: Everything from the Platinum tier, and three sets of miniatures

At the time of writing, the Dungeon Crawler Carl RPG campaign has raised $3,005,928, completely overtaking its initial funding goal of $250,000. The campaign ends on May 15 with fulfillment expected in late October 2026.

Ever since he was small, Tyler Chancey has had a deep, abiding love for video games and a tendency to think and overanalyze everything he enjoyed. This… More about Tyler

    Additional topics:

  • Announcement

  • RPG
